Subject: Requested Information
Message:
The Envision Team is in the process of updating our User database and need to request additional information from you.  For audit purposes we now need to have your P number (PID). The PID is an unsecured number that is part of Enron's Global Strategy to match an employee to his/her unsecured data which consist of email address, phone number, mailstop, company, cost center and manager.  NO access to personal or secured data is given.

 If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at 713/853-1555 opt 1.
